markdownRemark.html:
Commenting out stuff in .jsx files

  • You need to use {/* ----- */} in order to fully comment
  • Doing // or /* is not enough

Creating Components and Importing/Exporting

  • When you import a component you created, you should use curly braces

    • Ex: import { Skills_Test } from 'components/new_stuff';

  • Whenever you make a new folder within your project, you need an index.js file that exports everything from the components within

    • Ex: export * from './[folder'];
